programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E8 - 趙又廷林更新為任務大打出手
programme.desc: 全明星沉浸式劇情體驗綜藝；圍繞遊戲、喜劇兩大元素，以社會熱點話題為創作基礎，打造不同遊戲主題。一個盒子空間，一群神秘玩家，他們需要在各種離奇、爆笑和反轉中，一步步揭開故事真相，走出盒子，體驗一場專屬的心靈療愈之旅。

Fingers on Buzzers!
programme.desc: The doctors supersize tiny air sacs inside your lungs - your awesome alveoli! And it's fingers on buzzers in Ouchology – who will get snotted?

programme.title: Circles Get Around
programme.desc: Did you know you could draw a perfect circle by using your pinky finger? In this episode we introduce basic geometric constructions and explain the importance of fixed pivot-points. Are you up for the challenge? Eric is!

programme.title: Folded Paper, Hopping Frog
programme.desc: Can you turn a two-dimensional sheet of paper into a three-dimensional hopping frog? In this episode we explain the geometry behind paper folding and teach you how to create your own 3D aquarium! Crock, crock!

programme.title: Nature's got Talent
programme.desc: When disaster strikes just hours before their big performance at the Kiwifruit Valley Music Festival, Darwin and Newts have to find new ways to make music using creatures from nature.

programme.title: A Fright to Behold
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts celebrate Halloween by trick or treating with their forest friends.

programme.title: Surfing Snails
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers return to Table Mountain National Park in South Africa to discover the strange ways animals have adapted to survive in their secret worlds. Along the way they meet bats, surfing snails, and an army of ants protecting unusual plants.

programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: The Case of the Curiously Missing Kitty
programme.desc: When Mr. Tiggles goes missing, Addison must figure out if this is just a matter of a cat stuck in a tree, or a nefarious kitty kidnapping conspiracy.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Doki Digs to China
programme.desc: Oto builds a tunnel-boring machine. Doki suggests they find out if what his grandma used to say is true: can we really dig a tunel to China? The boys set off on a journey to bore right into the Earth's crust, while the girls race them to Beijing, China in the plane.

programme.title: Doki Digs to China
programme.desc: Oto builds a tunnel-boring machine. Doki suggests they find out if what his grandma used to say is true: can we really dig a tunel to China? The boys set off on a journey to bore right into the Earth's crust, while the girls race them to Beijing, China in the plane.

programme.title: Iceland
programme.desc: Iceland winter adventure: Ice climbing and glacier walking, stunning sunset snowmobiling at a massive glacier. Cultural experience at a local hot spring with language lessons from Icelandic teens. Unforgettable icy escapades with Nicole!

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: Crazy Craters
programme.desc: Eric learns that most asteroids burn out before they reach our planet. But sometimes, when they're super huge, they hit Earth and make really big craters. He does an experiment to show what would happen in that situation.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met.... a Base Ball Bat
programme.desc: Henry meets a Baseball bat in a sports shop but Baseball Bat has never played in a championship game before.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Sheepdog
programme.desc: Henry meets a Border Collie sheep dog and learns what a sheep dog does and why shepherds use them.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: Future of the Space Industry
programme.desc: With private companies becoming involved in space exploration, the space industry is booming. Host Emily Calandrelli explores space tourism, the thriving business of satellites, and how much activity there will soon be in low-earth orbit.

programme.title: Crazy Craters
programme.desc: Eric learns that most asteroids burn out before they reach our planet. But sometimes, when they're super huge, they hit Earth and make really big craters. He does an experiment to show what would happen in that situation.

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: Get Sporty
programme.desc: The Junior Vets get sporty, helping horses at a polo match! Magda, the mare, is just back from injury – will she make it through the game? Barnaby, the rabbit, needs surgery, and a Burmese python has the sniffles. Plus, Johnny and Inel meet a naughty, food-stealing dog.

programme.title: Unhealthy Appetite
programme.desc: A puppy with a sore paw needs help, and the Junior Vets are in at the deep end when Lacey, the horse, undergoes major surgery. Johnny and Inel meet a cat with an unhealthy appetite for human snacks.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: The Case of the Curiously Missing Kitty
programme.desc: When Mr. Tiggles goes missing, Addison must figure out if this is just a matter of a cat stuck in a tree, or a nefarious kitty kidnapping conspiracy.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: Get Sporty

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: E31 - Bus-Train
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: E30 - Leaves
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: E41 - It's Time To Watch A Family Film
programme.desc: JoJo finds something old in the cupboard - it's a video tape. Time for a Gran Gran plan to see what's on it. Soon, they are off to the library to find out if Terrence can help.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E41 - Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: E46 - The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E9 - Leek
programme.desc: Leek won't let the conditions backstage stop him from singing 'Can't Hold Me Down'.

programme.title: E8 - Okra
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: E45 - Double Trouble
programme.desc: Supertato and Carrot are looking for ice and think Evil Pea has become kind by giving them some. They soon realise it's not Evil Pea after all.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E12 - Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E1 - Andy And The Meerkat Pups
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Botswana, Africa and embark on a baby animal mission to help a meerkat family move home. Along the way, Andy meets some zebra and must race across an enormous salt pan to escape a hungry jackal.

programme.title: E18 - The Making Friends Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: E31 - Bus-Train
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: E30 - Leaves
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: E41 - It's Time To Watch A Family Film
programme.desc: JoJo finds something old in the cupboard - it's a video tape. Time for a Gran Gran plan to see what's on it. Soon, they are off to the library to find out if Terrence can help.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E41 - Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: E46 - The Playing Badge

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E1 - The Drakensberg: Barrier of Spears
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the wildlife of The Drakensberg Mountain range. We take a look at how creatures survive in the hostile landscape, from the highest peaks to the rolling grasslands below.

programme.title: E2 - Joey's Journey
programme.desc: Wombats are solitary, slow-moving creatures, but breeding time brings out their energy, aggression and lots of play. Meet a southern hairy-nosed wombat named Birri, who’s trying to find a mate, along with a female named Winnie and her joey, Fred.

programme.title: E1 - Catching Air
programme.desc: Watch beginners make their first leap into the air, like an Andean condor who must attend flight school before spreading its wings. Meet oddballs who soar without feathers and marvel at a peregrine falcon’s speed as it dives to catch its prey.

programme.title: E1 - The Drakensberg: Barrier of Spears
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the wildlife of The Drakensberg Mountain range. We take a look at how creatures survive in the hostile landscape, from the highest peaks to the rolling grasslands below.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E1 - The Drakensberg: Barrier of Spears
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the wildlife of The Drakensberg Mountain range. We take a look at how creatures survive in the hostile landscape, from the highest peaks to the rolling grasslands below.

programme.title: E1 - Seasonal Shores
programme.desc: Strap in for a thrilling ride as Lizzie travels by air, land, and sea to meet Alaskan wildlife and visit the world’s remotest corners. Eavesdrop on underwater Arctic residents with scientists, dine with polar bears, and scavenge with bald eagles.

programme.title: E4 - Gold Today Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: When golden nuggets mysteriously dry up on a couple's claim in British Columbia, the guys must crack the case: is it the miners or the mine?

programme.title: Of Rhinos And Men
programme.desc: A win for wildlife, a loss for humans. African nature reserves are restricting indigenous peoples' access to rivers and forests - and, in doing so, are endangering their very existence.

programme.title: My Five-Year Plan - Chinese Women Between Ambition And Tradition
programme.desc: Three young women from China are struggling to realize their dreams. While Chinese society is undergoing profound change, they are simultaneously feeling the social pressure to start a family and have children.

programme.title: Of Rhinos And Men
programme.desc: A win for wildlife, a loss for humans. African nature reserves are restricting indigenous peoples' access to rivers and forests - and, in doing so, are endangering their very existence.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: Why Is There A Black Market For Refrigerants In The Eu, And How Does It Wor
programme.desc: Reforms to phase out the most polluting gases are increasing prices for certified imports, and fueling a black market for cheaper, illegal imports from China. But not all gases are illegal , so tracing illicit imports is difficult. Sanctions are low, profits are high. The global warming potential of one 10kg cylinder is the same as driving 1.5 times around the world.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E5 - Small Wonders of Earth Week
programme.desc: Blippi explores the small wonders of Earth Week! He shrinks down to meet a friendly ant colony on a mission to find food. Then, he learns why flies love garbage trucks & meets a singing worm in the mud! The tiny adventures continue as Blippi discovers how spiders make webs, helps a blue jay rebuild its nest & flies inside a beehive to see how honey is made!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E5 - Small Wonders of Earth Week
programme.desc: Blippi explores the small wonders of Earth Week! He shrinks down to meet a friendly ant colony on a mission to find food. Then, he learns why flies love garbage trucks & meets a singing worm in the mud! The tiny adventures continue as Blippi discovers how spiders make webs, helps a blue jay rebuild its nest & flies inside a beehive to see how honey is made!

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E102 - Blaze Of Glory Part 2
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines. But when a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends and beat Crusher to the finish line.

programme.title: E120 - The Crew And Chase Are On The Case
programme.desc: There's a mystery afoot in Builder Cove! When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue...and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: E620 - Pups Save The Squirrels / Pups Save A Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard! // It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a roo and the day!

programme.title: E202 - A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: E814 - Children's Festival
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy go on a trip to the children's festival where there is lots of singing, dancing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E107 - Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E416 - Ninja Soup
programme.desc: Blackbelt isn't the only Ninja Master in his family- his Grandma Ninja has awesome moves too! But when she gets a nasty cold, Blaze, AJ and Blackbelt set out to make the most powerful medicine there is: Ninja Soup!

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: E426 - The Biggest Muddy Puddle In The World
programme.desc: Peppa and George wake up one morning to find that all the rain has made a flood, and their house is now a desert island!

programme.title: E502 - The New House
programme.desc: Peppa and George are taken to visit the home that Mr Bull is building. Will they find out who their new neighbors are?

programme.title: E626 - Pups Save A Tour Bus / Pups Save Midnight At The Museum
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the mini-patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T-Rex!

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E827 - Valentine's Day
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Daddy Pig gives Mummy Pig a card but Where's Daddy Pig's card from Mummy? Mummy Pig had put it in the post, but it hasn't arrived yet. Will Daddy Pig get a card?

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild

programme.title: E1 - Asteroids
programme.desc: Do we have a chance against a planet killer asteroid from space?

programme.title: E5 - The Sea Level Rise
programme.desc: The Sea Level Rise - can humanity stand against this threatening force of nature, or do we have to give up our coastal living space?

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: German In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E201 - The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: E703 - Candy Crushed / Master of Delusion
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Tendance XXI S12
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: E69 - Grillemont
programme.desc: The Chateau de Grillemont, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. It housed professionals of the Touraine faluns, ancient marine fossils that bear witness to changes over the centuries.

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Agricultrices
programme.desc: Florence, Aline and Lydie are farmers. Each in her own way has chosen to enter a struggling sector: organic vegetable growing, goat farming and viticulture. programme.title: All Night Long
programme.desc: Teacher Wang is being held hostage one night by a bank robber in an all-night shop. Shop attendant Ling-ling and Wang struggle with the badly wounded robber, who dies in the fight. With two more accomplices, the four girls decide to destroy the body and split the $40 million the man has on him. But his gangs catch up with the girls and are about to rape and then kill them...

programme.title: Legendary Award Winners: Heart Of Dragon
programme.desc: It's the two brothers of Hong Kong action as you have never seen them before in a gripping drama where the lines blur between family loyalty and upholding the law. Jackie Chan plays Ted, a SWAT officer with thwarted dreams of being a sailor because he has to look after his mentally disabled brother Danny. The resentment boils over in a terse showdown between the two brothers. When Danny accidentally ends up with a robbery loot while playing a harmless game of cops and robbers with his friends, Ted has to make an agonizing decision. Does he save the hapless Danny? Or arrest him?

programme.title: Heart Of Dragon
programme.desc: It's the two brothers of Hong Kong action as you have never seen them before in a gripping drama where the lines blur between family loyalty and upholding the law. programme.title: Police Story 3 Super Cop
programme.desc: Detective Chan is recruited by Interpol to infiltrate the operations of a drug lord. He is forced to survive with his wits and courage during the most dangerous mission.

programme.title: On The Run
programme.desc: Crack policeman Hsiang Ming is having a talk with his separated wife when a bullet from hired killer Ah Chui kills the wife, an anti-drug policewoman. Hsiang Ming goes after the killer but is told to keep off by senior officer Lu. In fact, Lu is head of a narcotics ring and lover of Hsiang Ming's ex-wife. She knows his secret, thus Lu hires Ah Chui to kill her. Then Lu sets about to kill every one connected with crime-the go-between and Ah Chui. On his death bed, the go-between tells Hsiang Ming where to find Ah Chui. This Hsiang Ming does. But Lu's men are coming to kill both of them. Hsiang Ming has to fight off the attackers. Hsiang Ming takes Ah Chui to his mother-in-law's house where Ah Chui meets Hsiang Ming's daughter and feels shameful. When Lu's men come, she saves the young girl and an injured Hsiang Ming. As Hsiang Ming's friends fail to stop Lu, Ah Chui takes Hsiang Ming to a secret hide out and nurses him. They become lovers...

programme.title: E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E37 - In Uzes (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Uzes fougasse and in its Roman aqueduct.

programme.title: E4 - Winter As The Water Flows
programme.desc: In the Bernese Oberland, above 800 metres winter seems suspended with no trace of snow on the shores of Lake Brienz. Markus continues to work wood in tune with tradition. On Lake Zurich, Manuel is in search of Asian clams whilst Angelo ensures the water taxis run to schedule.

programme.title: E15 - Fashion Special
programme.desc: Visit the Yves Saint Laurent museum and meet the great couturier. Somewhere between cinema and pop culture, Julien Fournie is deploying his art of haute couture on the red carpets. Jean Paul Gaultier invites Simone Rocha to revisit his archives. Micro or macro embroidery: Cyrielle Leclere steps outside the traditional framework.

programme.title: E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E2 - Designing A Third Place (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Back in LA, Jenny reflects on design and her time in Singapore, and returns once more. She meets locals and explores technology and nature to refine her design for a vibrant, living third place.

programme.title: E4 - Guitars
programme.desc: Dr Karl visits a guitar factory to see how Australia's favourite instrument is made. Precision machines and master craftspeople work in harmony to cut, shape, bend, sand, brace, glue, paint and coax a guitar into existence.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher alters the past in the hope of transforming his future with childhood sweetheart Amy Smart, only to disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Sound Supreme Trio of Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Fish Liew, Jennifer Yu and Peter Chan Charm Man, have been invited to voice over Cantonese version of the animation film “Ne Zha 2”. This episode features these three actors sharing the joys and challenges of the dubbing process. While Fish tells that Cantonese has been a big challenge for her, Jennifer surprisingly wants to gigantify herself when asked which character's magic she would like to acquire and Peter also praises Fish even more! Let's find more fascinating behind-the-scenes stories they are going to share one by one......

programme.title: Overheard 2
programme.desc: LAW Man-seng is one of the most reputable securities dealers in Hong Kong. One day, he drives his luxury sports car and notices that a car is tailing him. His car finally crashes and Law is sent to the hospital. At the hospital, he sees a police officer HO Chi-keung, and thinks the officer is here for the car accident. But Ho works for the Department of Homeland Security which is responsible for counter-terrorism. Ho has found some surveillance devices in the wreckage of Law's sports car which are for military use...

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.
